mapper.select: SELECT comm_no, comm_sugg_no, comm_parent, comm_content, comm_cdate, comm_mdate, comm_usage, comm_writer, comm_level FROM sugg_comment WHERE comm_sugg_no = #{comm_sugg_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y' START WITH comm_parent IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR comm_no = comm_parent ORDER SIBLINGS BY comm_cdate ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sugg_comment ( comm_no, comm_sugg_no, comm_parent, comm_content, comm_cdate, comm_usage, comm_writer, comm_level ) VALUES ( COMM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{comm_sugg_no}, #{comm_parent}, #{comm_content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{comm_writer}, #{comm_level} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sugg_comment SET comm_content = #{comm_content}, comm_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE comm_no = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE sugg_comment SET comm_usage = 'N', comm_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE comm_no = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
